content:
Hello all, I've been working on forward-porting the patchset from Safefetch, and it looks like as of v6.11 both the Safefetch patchset and a change from the Rust for Linux team touch the same exports in uaccess.h.

I am currently testing x86_64 builds with virtme-ng by compiling then running a program known to exploit a double-fetch vulnerability with safefetch enabled/disabled and counting the warnings with SAFEFETCH_DEBUG enabled.

Do any of you have ideas on how I could test this to ensure I haven't broken something on the Rust side? If I have, I could add a fix to my patch as I'm comfortable with Rust. At the moment I think I will run the same "CONFIG_TEST_USER_COPY" in x86 cuttlefish with my patchset to ensure it passes in addition to enabling Rust in my x86 virtme tests.
